role_title: Alpha Complex Instruments Product Lead, Vice President
secondary_archetype: Generalist PM with financial services domain specialization

seniority.level: Vice President (Senior IC / People Lead, financial services VP equivalent)
level_signals: Represents product team in executive-level discussions
Leads cross-functional teams including engineering, sales, operations

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Extensive knowledge of OTC derivatives, structured products, and other complex financial instruments.
must_haves.domain: OTC derivatives and complex financial instruments

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proven experience in product management, including strategy development, product delivery, and client implementations.
Strong understanding of front-to-back trade lifecycle management, financial systems architecture, and operational workflows.
Expertise in global regulatory frameworks affecting financial instruments, such as UMR, EMIR, and Dodd-Frank.
Proficiency in Agile methodologies and tools, with a track record of leading iterative development cycles.
Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to build relationships across diverse teams and senior leadership.

Develop and maintain a multi-year strategic roadmap for OTC derivatives and complex instrument product lines, ensuring alignment with client needs, evolving regulations, and State Street Alpha's strategic vision.
Build robust business cases with quantifiable outputs, ensuring a clear ROI and alignment with the business strategy.
Lead client discovery sessions to deeply understand operational challenges, regulatory demands, and market needs across buy-side and sell-side participants.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with data analytics tools (e.g., SQL, Tableau, Python) to derive insights and support decision-making.
Familiarity with emerging technologies like AI, machine learning, and DLT within financial services.
Prior experience working within a financial services technology platform or a similar business unit.

scope.surface: OTC derivatives and complex financial instruments product line within State Street Alpha (front-to-back integrated solutions platform)
scope.business_model: B2B financial services — institutional investor clients, custodian and asset intelligence platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Operational efficiency improvements in OTC derivatives workflows
Client implementation success and adherence to client-specific requirements
Regulatory compliance embedding in product features
core_responsibilities: Conduct market intelligence, competitive analysis, and industry trend research specific to OTC derivatives and complex instruments
Lead client discovery sessions to understand operational challenges and market needs
Develop and maintain a multi-year strategic roadmap for OTC derivatives and complex instrument product lines
Oversee the end-to-end product lifecycle from ideation to delivery
Build robust business cases with quantifiable ROI outputs
Embed Agile practices into product development cycles including standups, retrospectives, and sprint planning
Manage the product line's involvement in client implementations
Drive initiatives to improve system redundancies and operational efficiencies
Stay ahead of regulatory changes affecting OTC derivatives (e.g., uncleared margin rules, clearing mandates)
Integrate new technologies like automation, AI, and DLT into operational workflows
Represent the product team in executive-level discussions
Mentor junior team members and act as thought leader on OTC derivatives and complex instruments
